content: Enyala: Gods, this barrow smells like old pussy and rotting meat. Place is cold too—almost makes me miss the warmth of a bandit’s grip on my thighs after I split his skull. Mei: Yeah, well, at least it’s not as bad as that cave full of horny Rieklings last week. Little blue fuckers couldn’t decide if they wanted to stab me or fuck me. Enyala: I saw you handle both just fine. You’ve got the kind of swing that makes even draugr pause—before they try to mount you like a cheap whore in Windhelm. Mei: Speaking of Windhelm, you hear about those Stormcloak whores trying to ban public fucking near the Gray Quarter? Like Dibella herself wouldn’t strike them down for that idiocy.
